mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0

WITH RECURSIVE dept_path AS ( SELECT id, parent_id, 1 AS depth FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT d.id, d.parent_id, dp.depth + 1 FROM sys_dept d INNER JOIN dept_path dp ON d.id = dp.parent_id WHERE d.parent_id != 0 AND d.deleted = 0 ) SELECT COALESCE(MAX(depth), 1) FROM dept_path
